description: Beginning of a ketubba.Location: Fusṭāṭ. Bride: Sitt al-Milāḥ bt. Moshe, a widow. Groom: Sason. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100-1138 CE), and written under the jurisdiction of Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon (1127–1139 CE). T-S 20.86 and T-S AS 152.386 may be two pieces from the same ketubba.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
